result:
Batch 1 is complete. Here is a summary:

---

**Batch 1 — Steps 1, 2, 3 — complete**

All three commits landed on `feature/habits-calendar-v1`. Every verification passed (typecheck, lint, test, build) before each commit.

| Step | SHA | What shipped |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `aa4e4d4` | Tailwind v4, `@theme` tokens (paper/ink palette), Lora + Inter fonts, `app/layout.tsx`, placeholder `app/page.tsx`, `postcss.config.mjs`, `.eslintrc.json` |
| 2 | `7fd8afd` | `iron-session` cookie auth, TDD session helper (6 tests), login/logout API routes, login page, rewritten middleware supporting both cookie sessions and bearer tokens |
| 3 | `4e0024f` | TDD month-grid utilities (12 tests: Feb 2026, Monday-start, Sunday-end, leap year 2024, formatYmd, addMonths year rollover), typed `fetchHabitCompletions` client |

**Notable decisions:**
- `.eslintrc.json` added in Step 1 because `next lint` was unconfigured and prompted interactively.
- `NODE_ENV` readonly type error in the session test was fixed with a `Record<string, string>` cast on `process.env`.
- `middleware.ts` was fully rewritten — old version only handled bearer-token API auth; new version covers both UI routes (cookie → `/login` redirect) and API routes (cookie OR bearer token accepted).
- Results file written to `docs/implementation/let-s-get-back-to-curried-spring/results/batch-1.json`.
